name: M9 刺刀（★） | 外表生锈
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
